seoTitle: Lagrange vs Lake Argyle — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lagrange and Lake Argyle. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lagrange vs Lake Argyle: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lagrange and Lake Argyle.
heading: Lagrange vs Lake Argyle — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lagrange, Western Australia and Lake Argyle, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Argyle has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Lagrange (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lagrange or Lake Argyle safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lagrange has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Lake Argyle scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lagrange scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Argyle scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lagrange or Lake Argyle?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Argyle has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
